source: OxFml W073 conditional formatting typed visualization payload
current_rule: VerificationConditionalFormattingRule.typed_rule is the only accepted metadata source for the typed_only_families.
thresholds_rule: W072 bounded thresholds strings are intentionally ignored for the typed_only_families and remain meaningful only for scalar, operator, or expression families where threshold text is the actual input.
oxcalc_consequence: W039 OxFml seam evidence must not assume aggregate or visualization fallback from typed_rule to thresholds.
Any OxCalc fixture, bridge, or replay row that constructs these W073 families must use typed_rule metadata.
If exercised OxCalc evidence still depends on W072 bounded strings for those families, calc-f7o.7 must record a mismatch or handoff trigger.
No OxFml handoff is filed by calc-f7o.1 because this bead records scope and obligations only.
promotion_consequence: broad OxFml display/publication and pack/C5 claims remain unpromoted until W073 typed-only behavior is exercised or explicitly blocked in OxCalc evidence where relevant
